name: Bizagi Process Automation REST API
what_it_does: Bizagi process automation and low-code REST API for enterprises to design, execute, and monitor BPMN-based business process workflows — enabling automated case management, human task orchestration, decision management, and process analytics through Bizagi's low-code process automation platform. Enables AI agents to manage case management for process case creation, routing, and lifecycle automation, handle task management for human task assignment, notification, and completion automation, access process execution for process instance trigger and stage transition automation, retrieve case data management for process variable read and write automation, manage work portal for user work queue and case dashboard automation, handle event management for BPMN event trigger and signal automation, access reporting for process analytics and KPI reporting automation, retrieve search for process case search and filtering automation, manage entity management for Bizagi data entity CRUD automation, and integrate Bizagi with ERP, CRM, and enterprise systems for low-code business process automation.
use_cases: Orchestrating BPMN-defined business workflows and human task routing for process automation agents
Managing business process case lifecycle from initiation to closure for operations automation agents
Integrating process automation with enterprise systems via REST for IT automation agents
Monitoring process performance metrics and SLA compliance for business process analytics agents
not_for: Simple task management without BPMN process design (Bizagi is process-oriented BPM; simpler task tools serve ad-hoc task management)
Large-scale distributed microservices orchestration (Bizagi is business process automation, not infrastructure-level service orchestration)
Developer-first API integration without business process context (Bizagi is process-centric; API-native platforms serve pure integration use cases)
best_when: An enterprise wanting AI agents to trigger, manage, and monitor BPMN-based business process workflows — including complex human task routing, case management, and process analytics — through Bizagi's low-code process automation platform.
avoid_when: BIZAGI LICENSE REQUIRED: Bizagi is commercial software; automated open-source assumption creates license_required; Bizagi Cloud and On-Premises require subscription; automated must have Bizagi license. PROCESSES MUST BE DESIGNED FIRST: Business processes must be modeled in Bizagi Studio (BPMN designer) before API execution; automated api-creates-process assumption creates process_not_found for API calls to undefined processes; automated must design processes in Bizagi Studio before API automation. BIZAGI CLOUD VS ON-PREM DIFFER: Bizagi Cloud and Bizagi On-Premises have different API endpoints and auth; automated uniform assumption creates endpoint_mismatch for cloud API calls to on-premises Bizagi instance; automated must configure correct deployment endpoint. ENTITY MANAGER SCHEMA IS CUSTOM: Bizagi entity data model is customized per organization's Bizagi project; automated generic-schema assumption creates entity_not_found for entity operations using wrong entity names from a different Bizagi implementation; automated must query entity schema from specific Bizagi project.

auth.notes: Bizagi uses OAuth2 for Process Automation REST API. REST API with JSON. Reading, UK HQ (Bogota, Colombia origin). Founded 1989 by Jorge Mora and Carlos Jimenez. Private company. Products: Bizagi Studio (BPMN modeler), Bizagi Engine (process execution), Bizagi Cloud. 1,000+ enterprise clients in 50+ countries. Industries: financial services, energy, manufacturing, government. Recognized in Gartner BPM Magic Quadrant. Competes with Camunda, Pega, and Appian for enterprise BPMS.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Bizagi Modeler: free forever for process design; Engine and Cloud require paid subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per user; Bizagi Automation and Enterprise tiers; enterprise custom pricing
pricing.notes: Reading UK / Bogota CO. 1,000+ enterprise clients. Free modeler. Process automation BPM platform.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; process APIs throttled per subscription tier

known_agent_gotchas: PROCESS CASE CREATION REQUIRES VALID PROCESS ID: Creating a new process case requires the exact process name as deployed; automated friendly-name assumption creates process_not_found for case creation using display names instead of Bizagi process identifiers; automated must use exact Bizagi process identifier

TASK CLAIMS LOCK TASKS: In Bizagi, claiming a task locks it to that user; automated no-claim assumption creates concurrent_access for tasks claimed by another user when trying to complete them; automated must claim tasks before attempting to complete them

ENTITY PATHS USE DOT NOTATION: Bizagi entity attributes are accessed using dot-notation paths (Case.Entity.Attribute); automated flat-attribute assumption creates path_not_found for nested entity attribute access without correct dot-notation path; automated must use correct entity path notation

PROCESS VARIABLES ARE TYPED: Bizagi process variables have defined data types; automated untyped assumption creates type_mismatch for variable writes with wrong data type for the defined attribute type; automated must match variable data types to Bizagi schema definitions

TIMER EVENTS CAN BLOCK PROCESSES: BPMN timer events may hold cases in intermediate states; automated immediate-progress assumption creates process_stuck for cases waiting at timer boundary events; automated must handle timer events and consider timer duration in process scheduling
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise BPM. SOC2, GDPR, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU. Business process case and entity data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise BPM. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Business process and case data.
